/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libarm_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libarm_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/arm_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_msgs/msg/detail/arm_joint__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/arm_msgs/msg/detail/arm_joints__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
